name: Hydrating Face Moisturizer
description: A lightweight moisturizer that provides 24-hour hydration. Perfect for all skin types.

name: Matte Liquid Foundation
description: Full coverage foundation with a natural matte finish. Available in multiple shades.

name: Nourishing Shampoo
description: Gentle cleansing shampoo with natural botanical extracts. Safe for color-treated hair.

name: Anti-Aging Serum
description: Powerful serum with retinol and vitamin C to reduce fine lines and wrinkles.

name: Velvet Matte Lipstick
description: Long-wearing matte lipstick with a comfortable, non-drying formula.

name: Body Butter - Shea
description: Rich body butter with pure shea butter. Provides deep moisture for dry skin.

name: Volumizing Mascara
description: Dramatic volume and length for your lashes. Smudge-proof and clump-free formula.

name: Rose Petal Toner
description: Refreshing facial toner with rose water and witch hazel. Balances pH and tightens pores.

name: Repair Hair Mask
description: Deep conditioning treatment with argan oil and keratin. Repairs damaged hair.

name: Exfoliating Body Scrub
description: Gentle body scrub with sea salt and coconut oil. Leaves skin soft and smooth.

name: Radiance Perfume
description: Floral fragrance with notes of jasmine, rose, and vanilla. Long-lasting scent.

name: Daily Face Cleanser
description: Gentle foaming cleanser for daily use. Removes makeup and impurities without stripping.

name: Eyeshadow Palette - Earth Tones
description: 12-shade eyeshadow palette with matte and shimmer finishes. Highly pigmented.

name: Leave-In Conditioner
description: Lightweight leave-in conditioner for detangling and protection. Safe for all hair types.

name: Hand Cream Collection
description: Set of 3 hand creams in various scents. Nourishes and protects dry hands.

name: Under Eye Concealer
description: Full coverage concealer for dark circles and blemishes. Crease-resistant formula.

name: Night Repair Cream
description: Intensive night cream with peptides and hyaluronic acid. Repairs while you sleep.

name: Citrus Body Splash
description: Refreshing body spray with lemon, orange, and bergamot essential oils.

name: Sunscreen SPF 50
description: Broad spectrum sunscreen SPF 50. Water-resistant and non-greasy formula.
